strategy.visual_concept: Showcase a decadent dessert from Brookie Bar to highlight quality and indulgence.
strategy.audience_angle: Appeals to the audience's craving for aesthetic and delicious desserts, enhancing their perception of Brookie Bar as a go-to spot for weekend treats.
strategy.trend_influence: The growing trend of food photography on Instagram, where visually appealing images drive engagement and purchases.
strategy.composition_principle: Rule of thirds, positioning the dessert in the right third for dynamic interest.
strategy.conversion_rationale: The eye is drawn first to the vibrant and beautifully styled dessert. This immediate attraction leads to curiosity about the flavors, fostering a desire to purchase. The visual simplicity ensures viewers understand the premium quality at a glance, compelling them to click for weekend sales.

typography.body_treatment: Regular weight, sentence case, medium tracking
typography.headline_treatment: Bold, all caps, 1.5x the body size, tight tracking

output.cta_placement: Bottom 10% of the image, large button shape, high contrast with a dark background.
output.focal_subject: A beautifully plated dessert (e.g., a chocolate brownie topped with ice cream and drizzled sauce).
output.composition_layout: Centered asymmetrical layout, with the dessert slightly off-center to enhance visual interest.
output.reference_aesthetic: Similar to high-end food blogs showcasing gourmet desserts.
output.mobile_readability_note: Text is large enough to read clearly on a 6-inch screen without zooming.
